description_long: This office building features a modern, boxy structure with extensive floor-to-ceiling glass windows framed in dark metal, creating a grid-like facade on three sides. The building is predominantly white with clean, minimalist lines and a flat roof, suggesting a contemporary architectural approach. The glass panels allow for ample natural light and provide visibility into the interior, where some office furnishings and partitions are visible. The rear and one side of the building have fewer windows, with large solid white wall sections, likely for privacy or structural reasons. The roof appears to have some mechanical or utility installations, and the overall design emphasizes transparency and openness. There is no visible signage or prominent entrance detail, but the building's form and materials are consistent with high-end urban office spaces.
description: A modern office building with large floor-to-ceiling glass windows framed in dark metal, white solid walls, and a flat roof, embodying a sleek, contemporary style.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with two stories of large, grid-patterned glass windows and a glimpse of the interior office layout.
description_view_1: This side shows a mostly solid white wall with a single vertical strip of windows, contrasting with the glass-heavy front.
description_view_2: This angle reveals another side with a mix of solid white wall and a tall section of glass windows, plus some rooftop details.
description_view_3: This view displays the rear or secondary facade, again dominated by large glass windows and a partial view of the building's interior.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, grid-like arrangement of large rectangular windows spanning floor-to-ceiling in a repetitive pattern across the facade.
